tools.description: List routing rules. Shows the routing rules for the selected link.

tools.name: links_createrule
tools.title: Create routing rule
tools.description: Create routing rule. Adds a new routing rule to the selected link.

tools.name: links_deleterule
tools.title: Remove routing rule
tools.description: Remove routing rule. Deletes a routing rule from the selected link.

tools.name: links_getrule
tools.title: View routing rule
tools.description: View routing rule. Shows one routing rule on the selected link.

tools.name: links_updaterule
tools.title: Update routing rule
tools.description: Update routing rule. Saves changes to a routing rule on the selected link.

tools.name: links_addoffertorule
tools.title: Add rule offer
tools.description: Add rule offer. Adds an offer to the selected routing rule.

tools.name: links_removeofferfromrule
tools.title: Remove rule offer
tools.description: Remove rule offer. Removes an offer from the selected routing rule.

tools.name: links_updateofferinrule
tools.title: Update rule offer
tools.description: Update rule offer. Saves changes to an offer on the selected routing rule.

tools.name: links_syncrule
tools.title: Sync routing rule
tools.description: Sync routing rule. Refreshes one routing rule after offer or condition changes.

tools.name: links_reorderrules
tools.title: Reorder routing rules
tools.description: Reorder routing rules. Saves the order of routing rules for the selected link.

tools.name: links_listrulesummaries
tools.title: List rule summaries
tools.description: List rule summaries. Shows a quick summary of routing rules for the selected link.

tools.name: links_syncrules
tools.title: Sync all rules
tools.description: Sync all rules. Refreshes all routing rules on the selected link.

tools.name: links_createrulewithoffers
tools.title: Create rule with offers
tools.description: Create rule with offers. Adds a routing rule and its offers in one step.

tools.name: links_testrouting
tools.title: Test link routing
tools.description: Test link routing. Shows where the selected link would send traffic right now.

tools.name: links_gettrackingurl
tools.title: View tracking URL
tools.description: View tracking URL. Shows the tracking URL for the selected link.

tools.name: links_setbulkactivation
tools.title: Change link statuses
tools.description: Change link statuses. Turns multiple links on or off in one step.

tools.name: links_getavailableoffersforscope
tools.title: List available offers
tools.description: List available offers. Shows offers that can be used when building or editing links.

tools.name: links_getavailableredirectdomainsforscope
tools.title: List redirect domains
tools.description: List redirect domains. Shows redirect domains available for new or existing links.

tools.title: Change payout status
